issues: Incomplete plant - missing base where it emerges from ground and trunk
Shows a cropped/partial view of a leafy canopy instead of a full tree
Incomplete plant - missing stem/stalk structure and base
Only shows a single floating green leaf instead of a full plant with yellowing leaves and fruit
Incomplete plant - missing entire plant structure
Shows a square texture of bark instead of a massive bare tree silhouette
Shows a root system instead of long compound leaves
Shows hanging green catkins/flowers instead of yellow, drying compound leaves
Shows a round green fruit instead of stout, dark brown branches with leaf scars
Shows a dark purplish fruit/husk instead of thick, deeply furrowed dark bark
Shows an opened nut with a kernel instead of a thick, deep taproot
Shows a shelled nut kernel instead of a large, bright green spherical fruit
Shows a glass bottle of oil instead of a dark brown/black spherical husk
Shows a rectangular wooden plank instead of a heavily ridged nut shell

summary: While the pixel art itself is of good quality, the generation completely failed to map the specific descriptions to their assigned slots starting from slot 4. It appears to have defaulted to a generic 'tree life cycle and products' template (generating bark, roots, fruits, oil, and wood in sequence) rather than following the rigid item requirements for each slot. A massive regeneration is needed to correct the subjects.
